title: Vandenboschia × stenosiphon
taxonomy: Vandenboschia × stenosiphon is a hybrid species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a result of cross-breeding between two Vandenboschia species. As a hybrid, Vandenboschia × stenosiphon does not fit neatly into the typical binomial nomenclature used for most species. However, it is generally classified as a hybrid fern with characteristics from its parent species. Further research may provide more specific classification details for this unique species.

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis.
